name: Hearty Latin Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon chili powder or 2 teaspoons tabasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice and bulgur together.
2. In a large pot, heat the string beans, chili peppers, chili powder (or tabasco sauce), and hot sauce.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients. Simmer for 15-30 minutes.
